items.hook: HDB is launching more two-room BTO flats, which sounds like good news for singles
items.caption:
HDB is launching more two-room BTO flats, which sounds like good news for singles. But applications have climbed in step with supply, and oversubscription rates remain punishing. More units on paper does not mean an easier ballot in practice. Check the actual BTO demand data at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
组屋局增加了两房式BTO单位供应，听起来对单身申请者是好消息。但申请人数同样快速增长，超额认购情况依然严峻。供应增加，不代表抽签变容易。想查看BTO实际需求数据，请到 propsight.sg，链接在简介栏。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: Dunearn House just launched as the first private condo in Bukit Timah Turf City, startin
items.caption:
Dunearn House just launched as the first private condo in Bukit Timah Turf City, starting from $2,799 psf. That puts it well above most suburban condos in Singapore, and with no established resale comps in the immediate area, price discovery here is still early. Whether the Turf City story justifies that entry cost depends a lot on your holding horizon and how the rest of the precinct fills out. Check transaction data and price trends for free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
Dunearn House 刚以每平方英尺2,799新元的起价推出，是Bukit Timah Turf City首个私人condo项目。这个价格已高于新加坡大多数郊区condo，而且周边目前没有成熟的二手房成交价可以参考，定价仍处于摸索阶段。Turf City这个地段值不值这个入场费，很大程度上取决于你的持有年限，以及整个区域未来如何发展。想查看成交数据和价格走势，欢迎免费使用 propsight.sg 的工具，链接在个人主页。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Bishan has just 93 multi-generation HDB flats in total, and one just listed at $1.59M
items.caption:
Bishan has just 93 multi-generation HDB flats in total, and one just listed at $1.59M. These dual-key units let two generations live separately without the cost of buying two homes, but that scarcity is fully priced in. Before you decide whether the premium is worth it, check what similar units have actually transacted for. Free transaction data and tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
宏茂桥全区只有93个多代同堂HDB单位，其中一个刚以159万新元挂牌出售。这类双钥匙单位让两代人在同一屋檐下保持各自独立的生活空间，省去分开买两套房的成本，但稀缺性已经完全反映在价格里了。在决定这个溢价是否值得之前，建议先查清楚同类单位的实际成交价。免费数据和工具，请上propsight.sg，链接在bio。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Private resale prices in Singapore are sitting near $1,753 psf, up 3.8% over the past ye
items.caption:
Private resale prices in Singapore are sitting near $1,753 psf, up 3.8% over the past year but barely moving month to month. The mass market is leading: suburbs and city fringe are the active zones, while prime is the only segment seeing any softness. No distress, no crash, just a market that has stopped climbing and is finding its level. Read the full breakdown in the free monthly market report at propsight.sg/market-analysis, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
新加坡私宅转售价格目前约为每平方英尺1,753新元，过去一年上涨3.8%，但近期走势几乎持平。大众市场最为活跃，OCR和RCR的郊区与城市边缘地带价格持续坚挺，而核心区CCR是唯一出现轻微回软的板块。目前市场没有恐慌性抛售，也没有崩盘迹象，只是涨势放缓，正在寻找新的平衡点。每月免费市场报告详情请前往propsight.sg/market-analysis，链接在bio。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Where Singapore prices are really moving.
